targets.expr:
sum by (type) (rate(pwb_session_startup_duration_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster_name", ptd_site=~"$site_name"}[24h] @ end())) /
sum by (type) (rate(pwb_session_startup_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster_name", ptd_site=~"$site_name"}[24h] @ end()))

panels.description: The number of unlocked users that have logged in to workbench.
panels.title: Registered users

panels.description: Average response time in latency for all requests over the last 5 minutes.

targets.expr:
sum without (code,method,uri)(rate(pwb_http_response_duration_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster_name", ptd_site=~"$site_name"}[1m] @ end())) / 
sum without (code,method,uri)(rate(pwb_http_response_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster_name", ptd_site=~"$site_name"}[1m] @ end()))

panels.title: Avg resp secs (1m)

panels.description: Shows the response time threshold that partitions 99.9%, 99%, 95%, and 50% of the requests, to understand SLA agreements and how response times are distributed.
panels.title: Request time quantiles (1m)

panels.description: Current number of requests in progress
panels.title: Requests in flight

panels.description: Warning: misses some fast session starts
panels.title: Session start secs

panels.description: Includes user wait time if auto-join is not used.  Measures time till first response from session is proxied by the server that started the session.
panels.title: Session start to join secs

targets.expr:
sum by (route) (rate(connect_http_request_duration_seconds_sum{cluster=~"$cluster_name", ptd_site=~"$site_name"}[1m])) /
sum by (route) (rate(connect_http_request_duration_seconds_count{cluster=~"$cluster_name", ptd_site=~"$site_name"}[1m]))
